title: Hut 8 Mining Corp (NASDAQ:HUT) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Hut 8 Mining Corp Q3 2024 Earnings Call: Total revenue grew 102% year-over-year to $43.7 million. Net income: $0.9 million (vs. $4.4 million loss prior year). Adjusted EBITDA: $5.6 million (vs. $11.5 million prior year). Digital asset mining: $11.6 million revenue with gross margin expanded to 37%. Managed services: $20.8 million revenue with 86% gross margin. HPC/colocation/cloud: $3.4 million revenue. Power generation: $7.9 million revenue. Management announced purchase of more than 31,000 BITMAIN S-21 Antminer units to upgrade 111 megawatts of self-mining capacity. Expected 66% hash rate increase while improving efficiency by 37%. Highrise AI launched as GPU-as-Service offering. BITMAIN co-location agreement for 15 exahash deployment at Vega data center facility, anticipated to generate $135 million in annualized revenue by Q2 2025. More than 6 gigawatts of power expansion capacity under evaluation with 430 megawatts of AI data center potential deliverable before end of 2025. Energy efficiency improved with nearly 28% reduction in average cost of energy per kilowatt hour reaching approximately $0.28/kWh in Q3. Company ended Q3 with $649 million in combined cash and Bitcoin holdings.
